sources.exact_document_title: Statement on Documentation of Anesthesia Care
sources.population: Patients receiving anesthesia services across preanesthesia, intraoperative, and postanesthesia phases.
sources.clinical_setting: Anesthesia care continuum and anesthesia medical records.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for documentation fields and continuity of anesthesia records. It supports recording clinician-assessed facts and completed plans, not generating management, medicines, doses, procedures, referrals, discharge, or urgency.

exact_sections.heading: Documentation across the anesthesia care continuum
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports accurate, complete, and legible anesthesia documentation across preanesthesia, intraoperative, and postanesthesia phases.

exact_sections.heading: Preanesthesia documentation
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports identity, disposition, medical, surgical and anesthetic history, medicines, allergies and reactions, fasting, advance directives, airway and cardiopulmonary examination, tests, consultations, ASA status, plan including postanesthesia and pain care, and consent.

exact_sections.heading: Intraoperative or procedural anesthesia documentation
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports re-evaluation, equipment, medicines, staff, monitoring, techniques, positioning, lines and procedures, unusual events, fluids or blood products, output, and transfer status as recorded facts.

exact_sections.heading: Postanesthesia documentation
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports PACU admission and discharge records, discharge criteria, complications, postanesthesia evaluation, and documented recovery status.

sources.exact_document_title: Practice Guidelines for Perioperative Blood Management
sources.population: Patients undergoing surgical and other invasive procedures where blood loss, anemia, coagulopathy, or transfusion may be relevant.
sources.clinical_setting: Preoperative, intraoperative, and postoperative blood-management assessment.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for record review, prior transfusion and reactions, bleeding or thrombotic history, laboratory review, patient preferences, and clinician discussion of blood-product risks and benefits. Transfusion thresholds and management are not mapped.

exact_sections.heading: Preoperative evaluation for blood management
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports medical-record review, transfusion history, coagulopathy, thrombosis, medicine and comorbidity context, and relevant laboratory results.

exact_sections.heading: Patient preferences and blood-product discussion
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-documented discussion of blood products, risks, benefits, alternatives, and patient preferences without recommending transfusion.
